title: Social Placement Surface
description: Declared social-placement surface classification for social inventory, distinguishing the in-app surface where a social placement renders. This is seller-declared discovery metadata, not independent verification of inventory quality or delivery context.

enumDescriptions.feed: The primary scrolling home or timeline surface where posts and ads are interleaved with followed and recommended content.
enumDescriptions.stories: The full-screen, ephemeral tap-through surface presented between or alongside users' story content.
enumDescriptions.reels: The full-screen vertical short-video surface delivering algorithmically recommended clips.
enumDescriptions.shorts: The full-screen vertical short-video surface on platforms that brand the format as Shorts.
enumDescriptions.spotlight: The full-screen vertical short-video surface on platforms that brand the format as Spotlight.
enumDescriptions.explore: The discovery or browse surface presenting recommended content outside the user's followed graph.
enumDescriptions.search: The in-app search-results surface, keyed to the user's query.
enumDescriptions.marketplace: The in-app commerce or buy-and-sell listings surface.
